description.zh-Hans: 使用多阈值分形噪波生成迷彩/伪装图案纹理。支持可配置的颜色带（2-5种颜色）、斑块缩放、边缘柔化和有机块状形状。所有噪波均可平铺。
description.en: Generates camouflage / disruptive pattern textures using multi-threshold fractal noise. Supports configurable color bands (2-5 colors), patch scale, edge softness, and organic blob-like shapes. All noise is tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 迷彩, 伪装, 军用, 斑纹, 野外纹理
triggers.en: camo, camouflage, military pattern, disruptive pattern, woodland

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成军事迷彩图案纹理，用于角色服装或车辆涂装。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a camouflage pattern texture for character outfits or vehicle paint schemes.
